evals.prompt: I use Next.js App Router. Create a minimal @aura-stack/auth client instance and show where the file should live.
evals.expected_output: Creates a valid createAuthClient module for a client-capable framework with basePath/baseURL and short usage snippets.

evals.prompt: My project is an Express API only. Please create the Aura auth client API instance in this same app.
evals.expected_output: Rejects client instance creation for server-only target and asks for/proposes a separate frontend app.

evals.prompt: I have Nuxt for frontend and an auth backend under /api/auth. Set up the Aura client instance and quick signIn/signOut usage.
evals.expected_output: Provides Nuxt-compatible createAuthClient setup plus signIn/signOut/getSession snippets and verification steps.
